content.problemStatement:
Chef has XXX cones and YYY scoops of ice cream. Each ice cream cone requires exactly one cone and one scoop of ice cream.

Your task is to determine the **maximum** number of ice cream cones Chef can make with the available ingredients.


Input Format

Input will contain two integers XXX and YYY - the number of cones and ice cream scoops, respectively.


Output Format
Output the maximum number of ice cream cones Chef can make.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef has 10 cones and 5 scoops of ice cream. Chef can make a maximum of 5 ice cream cones.
